codeReview.summary: Current HEAD still matches the reviewed intent: `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts` no longer hardcodes `body.data.usd.value === 90000` for `/exchange_rates`, and instead asserts the contract that the BTC base unit remains 1 while USD is a positive finite numeric conversion and EUR is numeric. The reviewed commit only changed that single expectation block, which is consistent with broader compatibility coverage already present in `tests/app.test.ts` and `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts` for the same endpoint shape.

summary: Pass. Evidence reviewed: the existing scrutiny report, mission metadata, the feature commit `fb9e86a13b62be348ecc79e7d9c450ced9c24dd0`, and current HEAD in `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts`, `tests/app.test.ts`, and `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`. The implementation remains accurate against current HEAD: the live-data integration test now characterizes `/exchange_rates` by contract-compatible invariants rather than a brittle fixture-specific USD value, and no blocking or non-blocking issues were identified.
